_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Sithi umngane, ungenele.
speakFriend.description: I-Liana Banyan yakhiwe ukuvuliwa kulimi lonke. Ulimi ngalunye oluvuliwe lunobhizi bokuhumusha.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Uhlu lwezilimi namazinga e-Marks okwesikhashana. Marks amatoken okubambela, hhayi amahlandla.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Humusha i-Liana Banyan ngolimi lwe-{{language}}. Thola {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Igama ngalinye kuleli nkundla lanikwa ibizo ngezizathu. Imvelaphi yamagama ayi-26 abalulekile.
speakFriend.step2Body: Humusha zonke izichazelo ezidzingekayo. Thumela nge-Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Uma samukela, uthola Marks futhi urekhodi ku-IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Sithi umngane, ungenele."

languageSwitcher.tip: Sebenzisa amagama aphethe ezilimi ezihlukene eMnyango kaDurin ukuvula izinto ezikhethekile!
